ddls:
CREATE TABLE "complaints" (
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complaint */,
  "date_received" TEXT /* Date the complaint was received by the system */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the products table */,
  "sub_product_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the sub-products table */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the issues table */,
  "sub_issue_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the sub-issues table */,
  "narrative" TEXT /* Detailed narrative of the consumer's complaint */,
  "company_response" TEXT /* Public response provided by the company */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the companies table */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the consumer is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the consumer */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or keywords associated with the complaint */,
  "consent_provided" TEXT /* Indication of whether consumer consent was provided for sharing the complaint */,
  "submission_method_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the submission methods table */,
  "date_sent_to_company" TEXT /* Date the complaint was sent to the company for response */,
  "company_response_to_consumer" TEXT /* Company's response to the consumer's complaint */,
  "timely_response" TEXT /* Indication of whether the company's response was timely */,
  "consumer_disputed" TEXT /* Indication of whether the consumer disputed the company's response */,
  "complaint_status" TEXT /* Status of the complaint (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the complaint was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complaint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_submission_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_method_id") REFERENCES submission_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_sub_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_issue_id") REFERENCES sub_issues ("sub_issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_sub_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_product_id") REFERENCES sub_products ("sub_product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_tags FOREIGN KEY ("tags") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "parent_product_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the parent product category (for sub-products) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_products" (
  "sub_product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-product */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the products table */,
  "sub_product_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sub-product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "issue_name" TEXT /* Name of the issue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "parent_issue_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the parent issue (for sub-issues) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_issues" (
  "sub_issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-issue */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the issues table */,
  "sub_issue_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-issue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sub-issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Mailing address of the company */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the company is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the industry the company operates in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submission_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the submission method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the submission method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consents" (
  "consent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consent record */,
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the complaints table */,
  "consent_provided" TEXT /* Indication of whether consumer consent was provided */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date when consent was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consents_complaint_id FOREIGN KEY ("complaint_id") REFERENCES complaints ("complaint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the response status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the response status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timeliness" (
  "timeliness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timeliness record */,
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the complaints table */,
  "timely_response" TEXT /* Indication of whether the company's response was timely */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the company responded to the complaint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timeliness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timeliness_complaint_id FOREIGN KEY ("complaint_id") REFERENCES complaints ("complaint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disputes" (
  "dispute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dispute record */,
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the complaints table */,
  "consumer_disputed" TEXT /* Indication of whether the consumer disputed the company's response */,
  "dispute_date" TEXT /* Date when the dispute was raised */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dispute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disputes_complaint_id FOREIGN KEY ("complaint_id") REFERENCES complaints ("complaint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the complaints table */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_complaint_id FOREIGN KEY ("complaint_id") REFERENCES complaints ("complaint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., consumer, company representative, regulator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the complaints table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the complaint was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, respond) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_complaint_id FOREIGN KEY ("complaint_id") REFERENCES complaints ("complaint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaint_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the complaints table */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaint_history_complaint_id FOREIGN KEY ("complaint_id") REFERENCES complaints ("complaint_id")
)
